title: Retrieving problems from a specific test
content: Use the 'getTest' method to fetch all problem IDs associated with a specific, curated test or exam variant. Specify the 'subject' and the 'test_id'. This returns the problems in their original test order, which is useful for mock exam simulations.
examples: Get all problem IDs for EGE math test variant 5.
What are the problems in physics practice exam 123?
List all questions included in the 2023 chemistry mock test.
